subject: Alolan Grimer, a sludge Pokemon with crystalline formations and dark coloring distinct from standard Grimer
description: A large amorphous sludge creature with dark purple-blue coloring sits in a relaxed pose, its wide grinning face prominent. The creature's body is studded with angular crystalline formations that appear to be solidified toxins, giving it a jagged, bejeweled quality distinct from the smooth sludge of its standard form. The crystals catch light and give the creature a paradoxically colorful appearance against its dark base. A bright background suggests an outdoor setting, and the creature has a sunhat-like black accessory on its head. The overall mood is oddly cheerful despite the toxic subject.
foreground: dark sludge creature with crystal formations, grinning expression
